stemHtml:
For an IFR flight to Charleroi CRL the planned alternate is Liege LGG. Given the following information, what is the total time for the direct overhead overhead flight from the destination to the alternate?

Track from CRL to LGG: 075°T
Distance from CRL to LGG: 39 NM
Wind: 110°T/20 kt
TAS: 280 kt
